body: No person shall bet or wager upon the result of any boxing or mixed martial arts match, unless such bet or wager is conducted pursuant to sections 12-850 to 12-872, inclusive.
history: History: 1972 act specified prohibition applies to boxing and wrestling; Sec. 19-338 transferred to Sec. 21a-208 in 1983; P.A. 99-194 replaced reference to boxing exhibition with reference to boxing match and replaced reference to wrestling bout with reference to boxing exhibition; Sec. 21a-208 transferred to Sec. 29-143w in 2007; P.A. 13-259 made provisions applicable to mixed martial arts match and deleted reference to wrestling exhibition; P.A. 25-112 added exception re bet or wager conducted pursuant to Secs. 12-850 to 12-872, inclusive, effective June 24, 2025.
content.plainText: No person shall bet or wager upon the result of any boxing or mixed martial arts match, unless such bet or wager is conducted pursuant to sections 12-850 to 12-872, inclusive.
